MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF REDWOOD FIRE AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT ALL AREA ELECTRIC & CONSTRUCTION COMPANY.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is off calendar. Defendant filed a notice of bankruptcy stay on September 30. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
